Algorithm.code: 1. Assert: If _mapperFunction_ is present, then IsCallable(_mapperFunction_) is *true*, _thisArg_ is present, and _depth_ is 1. 1. Let _targetIndex_ be _start_. 1. Let _sourceIndex_ be *+0*<sub>𝔽</sub>. 1. Repeat, while ℝ(_sourceIndex_) < _sourceLen_, 1. Let _P_ be ! ToString(_sourceIndex_). 1. Let _exists_ be ? HasProperty(_source_, _P_). 1. If _exists_ is *true*, then 1. Let _element_ be ? Get(_source_, _P_). 1. If _mapperFunction_ is present, then 1. Set _element_ to ? Call(_mapperFunction_, _thisArg_, « _element_, _sourceIndex_, _source_ »). 1. Let _shouldFlatten_ be *false*. 1. If _depth_ > 0, then 1. Set _shouldFlatten_ to ? IsArray(_element_). 1. If _shouldFlatten_ is *true*, then 1. If _depth_ = +∞, let _newDepth_ be +∞. 1. Else, let _newDepth_ be _depth_ - 1. 1. Let _elementLen_ be ? LengthOfArrayLike(_element_). 1. Set _targetIndex_ to ? FlattenIntoArray(_target_, _element_, _elementLen_, _targetIndex_, _newDepth_). 1. Else, 1. If _targetIndex_ ≥ 2<sup>53</sup> - 1, throw a *TypeError* exception. 1. Perform ? CreateDataPropertyOrThrow(_target_, ! ToString(𝔽(_targetIndex_)), _element_). 1. Set _targetIndex_ to _targetIndex_ + 1. 1. Set _sourceIndex_ to _sourceIndex_ + *1*<sub>𝔽</sub>. 1. Return _targetIndex_.

AbstractOperationHead.name: FlattenIntoArray
AbstractOperationHead.retTy: either a normal completion containing a math value or a throw completion
AbstractOperationHead.virtualPackage: 23 Indexed Collections.1 Array Objects.3 Properties of the Array Prototype Object.13 Array.prototype.flat ( [ depth ] ).1 FlattenIntoArray ( target, source, sourceLen, start, depth [ , mapperFunction [ , thisArg ] ] )

YetExpression.str: If _mapperFunction_ is present, then IsCallable(_mapperFunction_) is *true*, _thisArg_ is present, and _depth_ is 1

Section.title: Properties of the Array Prototype Object
FlattenIntoArray ( target, source, sourceLen, start, depth [ , mapperFunction [ , thisArg ] ] )
